summary: Completed testing of Discovery system, Surgeons page performance, and CRM Zoho Campaigns integration (Iteration 12). Fixed critical bug in CRM page where API endpoints were incorrect (/campaigns/lists -> /admin/zoho-campaigns/lists). All features verified working.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct password returns token
Discovery stats endpoint (GET /api/admin/discovery/stats) returns stats object
Discovery search endpoint (POST /api/admin/discovery/search) works with state/city/sources
All discovery endpoints require authentication (return 401 without token)
CRM contacts endpoint (GET /api/admin/crm/contacts) returns contacts list
Profiles all endpoint (GET /api/profiles/all) returns surgeon profiles
frontend_tests_passed: Surgeons page loads quickly (0.07 seconds) without heavy framer-motion animations
Surgeons page shows search input, city filter, subspecialty filter
Surgeons page displays surgeon cards correctly
Admin Dashboard shows Discovery button (violet styling)
Admin Dashboard shows Bulk Import button (amber styling)
Admin Dashboard shows CRM button (teal styling)
Admin Discovery page renders with Search Settings, State/City dropdowns, Sources checkboxes
Admin Discovery page shows stats cards (Total Discovered, Imported, Matched, Pending Review)
Admin Discovery page shows Search Surgeons button
Admin CRM page shows Zoho Connected badge (after fix)
Admin CRM page shows contacts table with zoho_campaigns synced tags
Admin CRM page shows Import Surgeons and Add Contact buttons

bugs_fixed.issue: CRM page was calling incorrect API endpoints for Zoho Campaigns

critical_code_review_comments: Discovery search may return 0 results due to anti-bot measures on target sites (Google Maps, Practo, JustDial) - this is expected behavior as noted in agent context
Zoho Campaigns connection depends on OAuth token validity - token may expire and need refresh

features_verified.surgeons_page_performance: Page loads in 0.07 seconds without heavy framer-motion animations
features_verified.admin_dashboard_buttons: Discovery (violet) and Bulk Import (amber) buttons visible
features_verified.discovery_page_ui: Search Settings, State/City dropdowns, Sources (Google Maps, Practo, JustDial, NMC), Search button all present
features_verified.crm_zoho_connection: Shows 'Zoho Connected' badge after API endpoint fix
features_verified.crm_contacts_display: Contacts table shows zoho_campaigns synced tags

context_for_next_testing_agent: Discovery system and CRM Zoho Campaigns integration are fully working. Fixed API endpoint mismatch in CRM page. Discovery search may return 0 results due to anti-bot measures on scraping targets - this is expected. Zoho Campaigns OAuth token is currently valid and showing 'Zoho Connected'.
